sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21828" key="genarxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γεναρχ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n21828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be the ancestor of the human race</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ γεναρχῶν ἄνθρωπος</foreign> (of the Gnostic <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρωτάνθρωπος</foreign>) lamb.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Myst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
